class.name: thermocator/ThermalOverlay
class.description: Thermal map overlay. Color-maps OccupancyGrid values 0-100 from blue (cold) to red (hot). Unknown cells (-1) are fully transparent. Designed for /thermal_map but works with any OccupancyGrid topic. Colors and alpha are configurable per instance.

class.name: thermocator/ActionOverlay
class.description: Action zone overlay. Color-maps OccupancyGrid values 0-100 from transparent (low intensity) to bright green (high intensity). Unknown cells (-1) are also fully transparent. Designed for /action_map to visualize actioned zones with Gaussian falloff gradients. Colors and alpha are configurable per instance.

class.name: thermocator/ThermalLayer
class.description: Applies thermal heat map data as cost values in the Nav2 costmap. High temperature zones receive lethal or inflated costs. Subscribes to a nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid published by ThermalMapBuilder.
